channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Saskatchewan Court of Appeal Dismisses Impaired Driving Case in Fatal Collision
item.description: A Saskatchewan Court of Appeal has upheld a decision to stay proceedings in a THC-impaired driving case related to a tragic collision that resulted in the death of nine-year-old Baeleigh Maurice in Sa...

item.title: Trump Promises Strait of Hormuz to be Open Soon Amid Global Energy Crisis
item.description: US President Donald Trump has promised that the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global oil shipments, will be 'open fairly soon,' though he acknowledged that it would be a difficult task. Speak...

item.title: University of Ottawa on lockdown due to investigation of violent threat
item.description: The University of Ottawa was placed under lockdown on Friday evening after a 'violent threat' prompted an investigation. The Ottawa Police Service confirmed they were looking into a suspicious inciden...

item.title: Cuban President Responds to Donald Trump's Remarks About U.S. Takeover
item.description: The article reportedly covered Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel’s reaction to comments made by former U.S. President Donald Trump, who suggested that Cuba might be the 'next' nation for a political o...

item.title: 16-year-old charged with the murder of 14-year-old in Woolwich
item.description: A 16-year-old boy from Romford has been charged with the murder of 14-year-old Eghosa Ogbebor, who was fatally shot on Lord Warwick Street, Woolwich, on 2 April. Emergency services were called to the ...

item.title: Police Officer Fatally Shot During Drug Bust in Bacolod
item.description: A police officer was killed during an anti-narcotics operation in Bacolod City on Thursday night. M/Sgt. Romulo Galvez, part of the city's drug enforcement team, was fatally shot in the thigh after a ...

item.title: Congress discusses Middle East conflict and policy amid Israel-Iran tensions
item.description: The Congress party recently convened a high-level meeting to deliberate on the ongoing Israel-Iran tensions and the broader Middle East conflict. Key leaders participated in discussions centred on Ind...

item.title: Expert-Recommended Ankle Braces for Stability and Recovery
item.description: CNN Underscored’s April 2026 health feature, written by Caroline Curran, highlights the top ankle support braces as recommended by podiatrists and physical therapists. The article explains how ankle b...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal mother arrested after fatal stabbing of two young children
item.description: In a tragic incident in KwaZulu-Natal, police have arrested a 26-year-old mother following the fatal stabbing of her two young children, aged nine months and four years. The incident reportedly occurr...

item.title: Djibouti President Guelleh Wins Sixth Term in Office
item.description: Djibouti President Ismail Omar Guelleh don claim say e don win another term after the recent presidential election, which go make am serve as president for the sixth consecutive term. The 78-year-old ...

item.title: US Inflation Surges in March Driven by Energy Costs Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The United States experienced a significant jump in inflation in March 2026, largely due to escalating energy costs following the war with Iran. According to the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) repo...

item.title: Assam Police Constable Found Dead in Dhemaji; Suicide Suspected
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Dhemaji district, Assam, on Friday when a 34-year-old police constable was found dead under circumstances indicating possible suicide. According to officials, the constab...

item.title: Nigeria’s power generation struggles continue as 6,000MW target remains unmet
item.description: Since Adebayo Adelabu take over as Nigeria’s Minister of Power for August 2023, him don promise say the country go reach 6,000 megawatts of electricity before the end of that year. But three different...

item.title: Vehicle importers opt for rail transport amid worsening fuel crisis in Mombasa
item.description: As the fuel shortage in Mombasa continues to bite hard, car importers are now turning to trains to move vehicles from the port to Nairobi and other inland towns. The deficit in fuel supplies has drive...

item.title: Former Melania Trump aide challenges President’s claims about Epstein statement
item.description: Stephanie Grisham, Melania Trump’s former chief of staff, has publicly disputed President Donald Trump’s claim that he was unaware of his wife’s statement regarding Jeffrey Epstein. In an interview wi...

item.title: Haniel Jack Foundation Supports Rivers Students with Scholarships
item.description: The Ibanibo Haniel Jack Foundation don bless five indigenes from Rivers State wey dey study for different higher institutions with scholarships. The announcement come on Easter Sunday for Redeemer Bap...

item.title: Gladu's Shift to Liberals Causes Unease Among Progressives; U.S. Economic Woes Pose Challenges for Canada
item.description: The Liberal Party of Canada is positioning itself as a 'big tent' following the recent defection of Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu, a social conservative. However, many progressive members within the p...

item.title: Iranian Speaker Ghalibaf in Islamabad for Key US-Iran Ceasefire Negotiations
item.description: An Iranian delegation headed by the Speaker of Iran’s Parliament, Mohammad Baqer Ghalibaf, landed in Islamabad early Saturday to participate in crucial peace negotiations with the United States. The t...

item.title: Newsom Weighs Endorsement as California Democrats Face Risk of GOP Upset in 2026 Governor’s Race
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom has so far avoided endorsing any of the Democratic candidates seeking to replace him in the 2026 election, despite growing concern within the party about an increasing...

item.title: “Midnight Phantom” Chapter Eight Explores Brandon’s Motives and Nadja’s Fate
item.description: The eighth chapter of ABS-CBN’s romantic drama series “Midnight Phantom” continues to weave the tension and emotional depth between the main characters, Brandon Brazil and Nadja Ann dela Merced. Writt...
